docs:
# Aurora Background
A living gradient field that gives pages atmosphere without heavy markup.
## Import
```tsx
import { AuroraBackground } from "@/components/ui/aurora-background";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<AuroraBackground showRadialGradient variant={undefined} fade={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **showRadialGradient** (boolean) — default: `true`: Radial mask
- **variant** (string): Variant
- **fade** (boolean): Fade mask
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add aurora-background
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/aurora-background
```
